headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Simon Property Group, Raises Price Target to $193
summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   maintains Simon Property Group (NYSE:SPG) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $188 to $193.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Simon Property Group, Raises Price Target to $196
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Ki Bin Kim   maintains Simon Property Group (NYSE:SPG) with a Hold and raises the price target from $181 to $196.
